Legitimising implementation - now in html

A while ago I put together a two-page tufte-style handout about the legitimacy framework and nine pragmatic strategies that came out of my PhD thesis. That handout is good for circulating as a printed copy in person, but the online version available here has tended to be a bit awkward to share. An HTML version I have since put together an htm... Welcome to this

I need to put together a basic web presence to host some things on github pages. This is it. Welcome. What I am doing at the moment? Two-year post-doc position at Atlantic Technological University (ATU) in North West Ireland.
